phrases.intent_en: Ask where the car rental desks are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están los mostradores de alquiler de coches?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs mohs-trah-DOH-res deh al-KEE-lehr deh KOH-chehs?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, zona de llegadas, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah THOH-nah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, arrivals area, on the right.

responses.english: Ground floor, arrivals area, on the right.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah THOH-nah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Planta baja, zona de llegadas, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy bus tickets to city center
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro billetes de autobús al centro?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh KOHM-proh bee-YEH-tehs deh ow-toh-BOOS ahl SEHN-troh?

likely_response.local: Máquina automática fuera de la terminal, izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: MÁK-ee-nah ah-oo-TOHMÁ-tee-kah foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Automatic machine outside terminal, left side.

responses.english: Automatic machine outside terminal, left side.
responses.phonetic: MÁK-ee-nah ah-oo-TOHMÁ-tee-kah foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Máquina automática fuera de la terminal, izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand is located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la parada de taxis?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-trah lah pah-RAH-dah deh TAHK-sees?

likely_response.local: Salida de llegadas, justo enfrente de la puerta.
likely_response.pronunciation: sah-LEE-dah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs HOO-stoh ehnf-REHN-teh DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah
likely_response.translation_en: Arrivals exit, right in front of the door.

responses.english: Arrivals exit, right in front of the door.
responses.phonetic: sah-LEE-dah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs HOO-stoh ehnf-REHN-teh DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah
responses.local: Salida de llegadas, justo enfrente de la puerta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the currency exchange desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay una oficina de cambio de divisa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh eye OO-nah oh-fee-SEE-nah deh kahm-BYOH deh dee-BEE-sah?

likely_response.local: Terminal principal, planta primera, cerca de seguridad.
likely_response.pronunciation: tehr-mee-NAHL preen-thee-PAHL PLAHN-tah pree-MEH-rah THEHR-kah DEH seh-g-ree-DAHD
likely_response.translation_en: Main terminal, first floor, near security.

responses.english: Main terminal, first floor, near security.
responses.phonetic: tehr-mee-NAHL preen-thee-PAHL PLAHN-tah pree-MEH-rah THEHR-kah DEH seh-g-ree-DAHD
responses.local: Terminal principal, planta primera, cerca de seguridad.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the information desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar el mostrador de información?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kohn-TRAHR el mohs-trah-DOHR deh een-fohr-mah-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: En el vestíbulo principal, justo al entrar.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
likely_response.translation_en: In the main lobby, just upon entering.

responses.english: In the main lobby, just upon entering.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
responses.local: En el vestíbulo principal, justo al entrar.
